rootCause: The Settings legacy upgrade card parsed v1 cookies only from SSR `Astro.cookies` data via `migrationCookies.js` and never refreshed from `document.cookie` on the client. The global banner used a separate client-side detector, so cookies created in the browser were detected in the banner but ignored in Settings.
resolution: Introduced a shared v1 cookie detection helper, refreshed Settings detection client-side, surfaced parse warnings, and added unit + Playwright coverage to validate v1 cookie detection and merge behavior.
